# Home Theater Rubric

## Evaluation Criteria for Home Theater Setup

---

### 📊 Overall Scoring Scale
| Score | Rating |
|-------|--------|
| 90–100 | Excellent |
| 75–89 | Good |
| 60–74 | Satisfactory |
| 40–59 | Needs Improvement |
| Below 40 | Poor |

---

## 1. 🖥️ Display / Screen (25 points)

| Criteria | Excellent (5) | Good (4) | Satisfactory (3) | Needs Improvement (1–2) |
|----------|--------------|----------|------------------|------------------------|
| **Screen Size** | Appropriate for room size | Slightly small/large | Noticeably undersized | Poor fit for space |
| **Picture Quality** | 4K HDR, excellent contrast | 1080p, good color | Acceptable resolution | Blurry or washed out |
| **Viewing Angle** | Optimal for all seats | Good for most seats | Limited viewing angles | Poor angles |
| **Screen Placement** | Perfect height & distance | Minor adjustments needed | Somewhat awkward | Poorly positioned |
| **Ambient Light Control** | Blackout, no glare | Minimal glare | Some glare issues | Significant glare |

---

## 2. 🔊 Audio System (25 points)

| Criteria | Excellent (5) | Good (4) | Satisfactory (3) | Needs Improvement (1–2) |
|----------|--------------|----------|------------------|------------------------|
| **Speaker Configuration** | 7.1+ surround or Atmos | 5.1 surround | 3.1 or soundbar | Stereo or mono |
| **Sound Quality** | Clear, balanced, immersive | Good clarity | Acceptable sound | Tinny or distorted |
| **Bass/Subwoofer** | Deep, powerful, clean | Good bass response | Moderate bass | Weak or absent |
| **Speaker Placement** | Textbook surround setup | Minor placement issues | Somewhat off | Poor placement |
| **Volume/Room Balance** | Perfect calibration | Slight imbalance | Noticeable issues | Echoes or dead spots |

---

## 3. 🪑 Seating & Layout (20 points)

| Criteria | Excellent (5) | Good (4) | Satisfactory (3) | Needs Improvement (1–2) |
|----------|--------------|----------|------------------|------------------------|
| **Seating Comfort** | Recliners, premium comfort | Comfortable seating | Adequate seating | Uncomfortable |
| **Seating Arrangement** | Tiered or optimal rows | Good sightlines | Some blocked views | Poor arrangement |
| **Distance from Screen** | Ideal viewing distance | Slightly off | Too close/far | Very poor distance |
| **Seating Capacity** | Fits room perfectly | Slightly over/under | Cramped or sparse | Poorly planned |

---

## 4. 💡 Lighting & Ambiance (15 points)

| Criteria | Excellent (5) | Good (4) | Satisfactory (3) | Needs Improvement (1–2) |
|----------|--------------|----------|------------------|------------------------|
| **Lighting Control** | Dimmable, smart lighting | Manual dimming | Partial control | No control |
| **Bias Lighting** | Proper bias lighting used | Some accent lighting | Minimal lighting | Harsh or none |
| **Aesthetic/Theme** | Cohesive, cinematic feel | Attractive setup | Neutral/plain | Cluttered or unappealing |

---

## 5. ⚙️ Technology & Connectivity (15 points)

| Criteria | Excellent (5) | Good (4) | Satisfactory (3) | Needs Improvement (1–2) |
|----------|--------------|----------|------------------|------------------------|
| **Source Devices** | Multiple 4K sources, streaming | Good variety | Limited sources | Single/outdated source |
| **Cable Management** | Fully hidden/organized | Mostly organized | Some visible cables | Messy/hazardous |
| **Smart Integration** | Full smart home/remote control | App or universal remote | Basic remote | Multiple remotes, confusing |

---

## 📝 Comments & Recommendations

| Category | Score | Notes |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Display / Screen | /25 | |
| Audio System | /25 | |
| Seating & Layout | /20 | |
| Lighting & Ambiance | /15 | |
| Technology & Connectivity | /15 | |
| **TOTAL** | **/100** | |

---

> **Evaluator:** _____________________ **Date:** _____________
> **Location/Room:** _____________________
